title: autobench.guidance.lifecycle_transition v1
description: Emitted by deer-flow's GuidanceEvidenceBridge (packages/harness/deerflow/evidence/guidance_bridge.py, _emit_transition_event) when a deer-flow.guidance.fact.v1 event's lifecycle_status transitions to 'stale' or 'superseded'. Consumed by autobench's evidence-graph to invalidate downstream claims that cited the fact.

guidance_id.description: Fact identifier (guidance_id from the source event, or its CloudEvents id as a fallback).

channel.description: CloudEvents type of the source guidance-fact event that triggered this transition.

lifecycle_status.description: New lifecycle state. This event is only emitted for these two transitions.

related_claim.description: Claim ID this guidance fact maps to via category (edd-claim-002/003/004), or null if the category is unmapped.

value_score.description: Value score carried on the source event's payload, if present.

confidence.description: Stringified confidence annotation from the source event, if present.
